visual_dna.product_description: The Pigeon Air Fryer is a sleek and modern kitchen appliance designed for versatile cooking functions such as frying, defrosting, roasting, grilling, and baking. It features a compact, rounded design with a glossy black finish accented by gold trims, giving it a premium and elegant appearance. The top panel includes a digital touch interface with illuminated controls for easy operation. The fryer is equipped with a pull-out basket and handle for convenient food handling, making it a practical addition to any kitchen.

materials.texture_description: Smooth and polished surface with a reflective finish

lighting.shadow_characteristics: soft shadows cast below and to the right

structure.overall_shape: rounded rectangular with a slightly tapered top

motion_recommendations: slow 360-degree rotation to showcase the design
zoom in on the digital touch panel
pull-out motion of the basket to demonstrate functionality
camera_angle_suggestions: front angle to highlight the logo and handle
top-down angle to showcase the digital panel
side angle to emphasize the gold accents and overall shape
